home.title: Salvador Fernández
home.description:
I am a Full-Stack Developer with strong experience building modern web applications, specialized in Angular for the frontend and backed by solid knowledge of SQL and Java on the backend.

I focus on creating scalable, maintainable, and well-structured solutions, combining clean architecture with efficient data management. I enjoy working on projects where technology solves real-world problems and delivers tangible value.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: I have experience in a wide range of technologies and tools, including Angular, Java, SQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, Git, Docker, and more. I strive to stay updated with the latest trends and best practices in web development to deliver high-quality solutions.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: I have worked on various projects ranging from enterprise web applications to personal projects. Some of my notable projects include a task management platform, an online booking system, and a habit tracking application. Each project has allowed me to apply my technical skills and learn new technologies.

project1.title: Inventory Management System
project1.description: New version with Angular 18, signals, updated PrimeNG, NestJS backend, and AI support for stock predictions. Currently in active development.

project2.title: Analytics Dashboard with AI
project2.description: Real-time data visualization + integration with machine learning models for forecasting.

project3.title: Habit Tracking Application
project3.description: A mobile application to help users establish and maintain healthy habits, with personalized reminders and progress analysis.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.description: Do you have a project in mind? I'm ready to listen.

messageProperties.minLength: Message must be at least 10 characters long
